mapper.select:
SELECT id, level_device, level_tag, level_location, level_equip, level_model, level_manu, level_medium, level_range, level_accuracy, level_power, level_output, level_connection, level_interlock, level_interlock_val, level_remark, status, dv_type FROM level_gauge
AND level_tag LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.levelTag}, '%')
AND level_equip LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.levelEquip}, '%')
AND level_interlock = #{queryParams.levelInterlock}
AND dv_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.dvType}, '%')

SELECT id, level_device, level_tag, level_location, level_equip, level_model, level_manu, level_medium, level_range, level_accuracy, level_power, level_output, level_connection, level_interlock, level_interlock_val, level_remark, status, dv_type FROM level_gauge
AND level_tag LIKE CONCAT('%', #{levelTag}, '%')
AND level_equip LIKE CONCAT('%', #{levelEquip}, '%')
AND level_interlock = #{levelInterlock}
AND dv_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dvType}, '%')
